headlines.title: Senate rebukes Trump by approving House-passed measure calling for end to Iran war
headlines.description: Passage of the largely symbolic measure comes as the U.S. and Iran are in the early stages of talks aimed at ending the war.

headlines.title: Zohran Mamdani’s clout and a double Trump endorsement on the line in today’s primaries
headlines.description: The parties will also set up a handful of key House battleground races as voters in Maryland, New York, South Carolina and Utah pick nominees.

headlines.title: Trump touts U.S. economy and oil prices in a midterm pitch in Pennsylvania
headlines.description: Speaking in a key Pennsylvania swing district, President Donald Trump sought to reassure voters that costs are coming down as the war with Iran ends.

headlines.title: 5 vulnerable incumbents to watch in tonight’s primaries: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: If it’s Tuesday, it’s another primary day. Steve Kornacki looks at the sitting members of Congress who are at risk of losing.

headlines.title: Kornacki: Incumbents in New York, Maryland, Utah look to fend off primary challenges
headlines.description: Voters head to the polls in New York, Maryland, South Carolina and Utah as President Trump hits the campaign trail in battleground Pennsylvania. NBC News correspondents Jon Allen, Julie Tsirkin, Sahil Kapur and Steve Kornacki preview the key races.

headlines.title: Trump Defends Iran Concessions as Vance Touts Negotiations
headlines.description: Vice President JD Vance says his marathon first round of negotiations with Iran have set the foundation for a lasting peace deal. It comes as President Donald Trump faces criticism for Iran’s 60-day waiver for U.S. sanctions, allowing them to sell oil freely on the open market. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Trump claims proof of Reflecting Pool vandalism will be seen in court
headlines.description: President Trump is claiming without evidence that vandals are responsible for recent problems facing the newly renovated Reflecting Pool on the National Mall. NBC News’ Gary Grumbach reports on the algae growth and peeling paint that are plaguing the landmark.

headlines.title: U.S. deportation tracker: Counting arrests, detentions and border crossings
headlines.description: President Donald Trump came into office promising the largest mass deportation in U.S history, targeting the more than 10 million unauthorized migrants living in the United States.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Timeline: The ups and downs of Trump’s Reflecting Pool renovation project
headlines.description: The Reflecting Pool on the National Mall was supposed to get a face-lift to celebrate America’s 250th birthday. Instead, it’s become a political talking point.

headlines.title: 6 people arrested in connection with the alleged vandalism of the Reflecting Pool, Trump says
headlines.description: The president also said seven people have been cited, but he has provided no evidence so far of the alleged vandalism.

headlines.title: Trump administration tried to force journalists to testify before federal grand jury in leak probe
headlines.description: The Trump administration attempted to compel testimony from four journalists before a federal grand jury in recent weeks, an official familiar with the matter told NBC News, but backed off the matter after the news organizations pushed back behind the scenes
